mathcoding.description: Artifact-centered mathematical development agent. Converts tasks into formal packets with assumptions, specs, evidence, refinement and traceability.

mathcoding-verifier.description: Mechanical verifier wrapper for SANY and TLC. Produces structured verification evidence.

mathcoding-synthesizer.description: Refinement-aware synthesizer that maps verified models into implementation artifacts.

mathpacket.description: Create a canonical MathCoding task packet from a natural language problem
mathpacket.template:
$ARGUMENTS

Convert this request into a MathCoding task packet. Create explicit problem and assumptions artifacts first. Use canonical TLA+ artifact names `Model.tla` and `Model.cfg`. Produce a formalization plan, not code, unless the user explicitly asks for synthesis.
